data.chapter_title_en: Invocations for when the wind blows
data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْــــــأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا)).
data.english_text: (O Allah, I ask You for it’s goodness and I take refuge with You from it’s evil.)
data.transliteration: (Allahumma innee as-aluka khayraha wa-aAAoothu bika min sharriha.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma innee as-aluka khayraha wa-aAAoothu bika min sharriha.)
